LanguageData.SD_MemoryCore.degreeDatas.0.label: memory core
LanguageData.SD_MemoryCore.degreeDatas.0.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has an exceptional memory. Beyond retaining vast amounts of information, {PAWN_pronoun} possesses perfect muscle memory. {PAWN_possessive} skills never decay.
LanguageData.SD_kind.degreeDatas.0.label: pale self
LanguageData.SD_kind.degreeDatas.0.description: {PAWN_nameDef} hopes to be kind and strong...
